## What this PR does

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix in core / adapter / audit
- [ ] New country data
- [ ] Country data correction
- [ ] New adapter / integration
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other:

## If this is a country data PR

Each rule changed must include a primary-source citation. PRs without citations will be closed.

For each changed field, list:

- **Field:** (e.g. `byContext.lead-magnet.canCollectForMarketing`)
- **From → To:**
- **Citation (statute / regulation / guidance / case):**
- **URL:**
- **Why this supports the change:**

## Tests

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the changed behaviour
